comment.body: 42B is the10yr auction per month. CPI comes out hot, yields spike bonds drop. Treasury scoops it up, normalizes the yields. Yellen also used to do this and bessent famously was heavily opposed to it (ironic right?)

comment.body: Not necessarily blindly against Trump or every single thing his admin is doing. Yet, one would be lying to say Trump is not unpredictable. The unpredictability gives an advantage when dealing with adversaries like Iran. Yet, due to the uncertainties (which also make investors hesitate), one avoids swinging and resort to day trading, which is more similar to gambling, and is time consuming. No politicians, even those whom we support, are immune from criticisms/facts.

comment.body:
You know some of the best performing best simply buy when Trumps mouth brings the market down? Thats been a strategy they deploy. Buy when he talks and brings the market down and assets or quality are down x% 
My point is that a lot of its theater and simple higher lows buying pay really well on swings with low risk unless you’re emotional trading in fear. I know plenty of traders that have great success buying fear as long as we hold key levels and the technicals are still there regardless of what Trump or the news says
